main_post.text:
🔍 GitHub Release Update: v0.1.10

Sunwood-ai-labs published a new release for their github-account-scanner detection test repository.

🎯 Key Points:
• Production-profile live verification
• Worker switched from test to production mode
• End-to-end detection test completed
• Discord notification flow validated

This is a dedicated test repository to ensure the github-account-scanner system reliably detects new releases and sends notifications correctly.

$ONIAGI
